ul.li: Addressing Tier: Double Indirect (Direct: 0-11, Single: 12-523, Double: 524-262659)
Logical Holes: Blocks 0 through 2559 contain no physical allocation. ls -ls will report 10MB size but only 12KB (3 blocks) of disk usage.
Overhead: 2 metadata blocks (Phys #100, #101) required to address the sparse write.
